metadata.description: Create custom animated Codex pets — any mascot, any style.

plugins.name: hatch-pet-plus
plugins.description: Create custom animated Codex pets — any mascot, any style. Turn a text concept or your own character art into a fully animated pet: base sprite, 9 animation rows, 16 look directions, then despill, validate and package a v2 8x11 spritesheet.
